calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Petitioners Jacky Xiongzhan Tse & Lijuan Zhou were present in pro per as Guardian ad Litems for the minor, Qixin Xie.
Petitioners were placed under oath examined.
Jenna Zhang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Mike Qixin Tse.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
